---
name: Refactoring
about: Code cleanup or restructure
title: '[REFACTOR] '
labels: 'refactor'
assignees: ''
---

## Description
[What needs to be refactored and why]

## Scope
- Files affected: [list files or directories]
- Functions/components: [specific items to refactor]

## Current State
[Describe the current problematic code]

## Target State
[Describe what the code should look like after]

## Motivation
- [ ] Improve readability
- [ ] Improve performance
- [ ] Remove technical debt
- [ ] Follow new standards
- [ ] Other: [reason]

## Breaking Changes
- [ ] No breaking changes
- [ ] May break existing functionality - requires testing
- [ ] Breaking changes - migration needed

## Risk Level
- [ ] Low - Isolated change, easy to test
- [ ] Medium - Affects multiple components
- [ ] High - Core functionality, requires thorough testing

## Test Plan
- [ ] Add unit tests for refactored code
- [ ] Run existing test suite
- [ ] Manual testing of affected features

## Priority
- [ ] priority:critical
- [ ] priority:high
- [ ] priority:medium
- [ ] priority:low

## Effort
- [ ] effort:xs - Less than 1 hour
- [ ] effort:s - 1 day
- [ ] effort:m - 1-3 days
- [ ] effort:l - 1 week
- [ ] effort:xl - More than 1 week

## Related
- Related issues: [links]
- References: [code links or documentation]
